title: できたてはごろり、たっぷりと

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day on the training course, I smell something
delicious...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Mm, this curry turned out wonderfully! ♪ I hope
everyone enjoys it!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh? Something smells really good...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, Oguri. Are you finished for today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Hey, Creek, do you know where that
smell's coming from?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that would be me! I brought some homemade
curry! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Curry!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold on. Why did you bring curry?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam's been training all day today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I knew she'd probably work up an appetite, so I
made a little something for her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I accidentally went overboard. I figured I
could give away the extra.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, okay! In that case, don't mind if I do...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! If you're that hungry, then I'll serve up a
portion right away. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you really ate it up.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it was so good! Actually, I was wondering...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't worry, there's still plenty to go
around. Feel free to have seconds!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Eat up! Growing Umamusume need a lot of food!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing ...Phew! I think I still have room,
though.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You eat so fast! And you're still hungry?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
What passion! ♪ If that's the case, then you can
eat until you're full!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap eats, then Super Creek serves more.
Then Oguri Cap eats... until...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... Now, that hit the spot...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You had me a little worried there for a
moment, but thankfully there was enough
curry! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, please don't tell me I ate Tama's share.
Did I?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, are you worried? Aww, you're so sweet,
Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! I can cook up some more
lickety-split! I've got this! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Really? I'll help!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, are you sure? You really are too sweet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Mm...
